_comment: EnsembleBackend = the model-combination loop (N models -> 1 answer), as a tehai backend. Run THROUGH tehai: `tehai bench --backends ensemble,ssh-openai --config <this> --tier large` compares the combined model vs a single strong model. Fill ssh_host. This shows a HOMOGENEOUS self-ensemble (one 7B repeated n times, temperature for diversity). For a HETEROGENEOUS mix, replace member+n with members:[{backend,kwargs}, ...]. strategy: synthesize (aggregator writes final) | majority | first.
